calendar.matters:
HEARING ON RESPONDENT JOSE ALBERTO LAMAS JERONIMO'S OBJECTOIN TO THE PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME OF THE MINOR
Off Calendar Oct-10-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The matter came on for Change of name of Minor of Petitioner Zoltan Santana Lamas Kolozsvari.

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: D. Carter; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:54am and concluding at 10:01am.

Petitioner Safi Kolozsvari appeared with her attorney Katherine Wetterstrand in court.
Other Parent Jose Alberto Lamas Jeronimo appeared in court.

Petition for change of name and gender filed July 29, 2025.

Amended Order to show cause filed August 28, 2025.

Objection to Petition for Change of Name filed by the Mr. Jeronimo on September 16, 2025.

The Court addresses the petitioner.

The Petitioner provides testimony.

After discussion with Ms. Wetterstrand, the Petition is withdrawn. Plaintiff may file a request to change the minor's name through a Request for Order to be filed in the Family Law Case.
